info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Creation API
info.description: The User Account Creation API enables businesses to streamline the onboarding process by allowing new clients to register for accounts. This API facilitates the submission of user information and manages the creation of user profiles, ensuring that essential data is collected and verified. Typical consumers of this API include client-side applications, registration forms on websites, and third-party services requiring user account management functionality.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new account by providing the necessary details. Upon successful creation, the account information will be returned.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. It should contain the necessary information required for account creation, such as user details and any associated configurations.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred during the request.

404.description: The requested account resource could not be found.

200.description: The request was successful and the account resource was retrieved.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Accounts Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the request indicating whether it failed.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the error response returned when a POST operation related to accounts fails.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer related to the error.

errorCode.description: The specific error code associated with the failure.

message.description: A detailed error message describing the specific issue.
message.example: The account with the specified ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Schema representing the detailed error information related to the request that failed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Accounts Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status indicating whether the operation was successful.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message providing additional context about the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the internal error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the error response returned when an accounts operation fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer for whom the account is being created.

accountType.description: The type of account to be created, such as 'savings' or 'checking'.

currency.description: The currency in which the account will operate, represented by an ISO currency code.

initialDeposit.description: The initial deposit amount to fund the new account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema for the request body when creating a new account.

accountId.description: The unique identifier for the created account.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: The type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: The currency in which the account balance is maintained.

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Represents the response schema for successful account creation operations.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
